author: y4rr
content: Phase 5 V1 SwiGLU paging works: TEAL magnitude threshold replaces FATReLU > 0; SVD gate predictor (cuSOLVER full SVD, 127s for Llama 3 8B) implemented as training-free per-layer predictor; PagedLlamaInferencer dispatches on either ProSparse, SVD, or no predictor. Llama 3 8B end-to-end: cos_sim=1.0 at TEAL=0.05, cos_sim=0.99996 at TEAL=0.2 (36% neuron-level sparsity), cos_sim=0.91 at TEAL=1.0 (60% block savings ceiling). 67 tests pass. Page gate_proj remains future work — V1 keeps gate_proj resident as before. internal tooling
